episodes.title: Bill Gates apologizes for ties to Epstein: report
episodes.description:
Tech pioneer Bill Gates reportedly held a town hall with Gates Foundation staff to apologize for his ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Democrats demand full release of Epstein files
episodes.description:
The top Democrat of the House Oversight Committee is accusing the Department of Justice of illegally withholding dozens of pages from its files on convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein – specifically, pages tied to a woman who accused the president of assaulting her when she was 14.

episodes.title: Former UK ambassador to the US arrested amid investigation into alleged ties to Jeffrey Epstein
episodes.description:
Peter Mandelson, a former U.K. ambassador to the U.S., has been arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office, stemming from his ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

Read more: https://www.kvue.com/article/syndication/associatedpress/police-say-former-uk-ambassador-peter-mandelson-arrested-in-misconduct-probe-over-his-ties-with-jeffrey-epstein/616-36e6894a-68bf-4d8d-99fc-ee6e83da07ef
